creator: jacula@gmail.com
text:
Hi all,

this patch is related to my Pr:

ports/132279: [MAINTAINER UPDATE]: print/hs-hscolour version 1.12
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/132279

Jacula Modyun

http://www.lefweb.uniss.it/index.php?sez=6&arg=6&txt=1&id=4820

>Fix:

--- patch-bsd.haskell.mk begins here ---
--- bsd.haskell.mk.orig	2009-03-07 11:21:34.000000000 +0000
+++ bsd.haskell.mk	2009-03-07 11:22:41.000000000 +0000
@@ -1382,7 +1382,7 @@
 HADDOCK_INTERFACES?=	${HADDOCK_INTERFACE}
 
 ## Hscolour related things.
-HSCOLOUR_VERSION?=	1.10
+HSCOLOUR_VERSION?=	1.12
 HSCOLOUR_DATADIR?=	${LOCALBASE}/share/hscolour-${HSCOLOUR_VERSION}
 HSCOLOUR_CSS?=		${HSCOLOUR_DATADIR}/hscolour.css
 
--- patch-bsd.haskell.mk ends here ---
